accurate.why: Accurately describes the transfer from Army Corps of Engineers to Bureau of Indian Affairs (from the bill's title), and correctly describes trust arrangement.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated content; all specific claims trace to the bill text.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as transferring land into trust for the Winnebago Tribe.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Describes the trust arrangement and reservation declaration under 1865 treaty terms.

exceptions_conditions.why: Notes the gaming prohibition and valid existing rights condition.

effective_dates.why: Notes the approval date of July 12, 2024.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers all three tracts, trust holding, reservation declaration, and gaming prohibition.

correct_entities.why: Army Corps of Engineers, Bureau of Indian Affairs, Winnebago Tribe of Nebraska, and Indian Gaming Regulatory Act all correctly named.

correct_figures.why: 1865 treaty and July 12, 2024 approval date are accurate.
